buyers.thesis: CMC acquired CP&P for $675M and Foley Products in 2025 to build the largest precast platform in the US, focused on Mid-Atlantic and Southeast. Design Precast's Gulf Coast/Mississippi operations fill a critical geographic gap between CMC's Southeast and Texas operations.

3 acquisitions in 6 years building national precast/pipe platform (Geneva Pipe 2020, ParkUSA 2021, Boughton's 2026). Design Precast adds Gulf Coast pipe manufacturing to their growing national footprint.

CRH/Oldcastle Infrastructure is the largest precast infrastructure company in North America. Design Precast's Gulf Coast pipe and precast operations add Mississippi manufacturing capacity to Oldcastle's Southeast network.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - Oldcastle national precast platform

buyers.thesis: Forterra is a leading precast pipe and concrete products manufacturer, taken private by Quikrete. Design Precast's Gulfport MS location and pipe manufacturing capabilities are directly complementary to Forterra's product line.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - Forterra pipe and precast operations

buyers.thesis: Actively acquiring Southeast precast companies (Benton Precast in SC, Dec 2024). Design Precast's Mississippi operations extend Alcrete's footprint west along the Gulf Coast.
Just exited CP&P to CMC for $675M. Proven precast roll-up operator. May redeploy capital into Gulf Coast precast platform with Design Precast as a foundation or add-on.

Major construction materials company expanding through acquisition. Design Precast's pipe and precast operations in Mississippi add Gulf Coast infrastructure products to Knife River's materials portfolio.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - Knife River growth strategy

buyers.thesis: Rinker Materials (under Quikrete) manufactures concrete pipe and precast products across the Southeast. Design Precast's Gulfport MS facility fills a manufacturing gap between their Florida and Texas operations.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - Rinker Southeast pipe operations

buyers.thesis: Thompson Pipe Group manufactures reinforced concrete pipe, precast structures, and steel pipe. Design Precast's Gulf Coast pipe manufacturing extends their geographic reach into the Southeast infrastructure market.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - Thompson Pipe national expansion

buyers.thesis: Summit Materials (NYSE: SUM) acquired Argos USA for $3.2B. Actively expanding concrete and construction materials through M&A. Design Precast adds precast/pipe manufacturing in growing Gulf Coast infrastructure market.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - Summit Materials M&A strategy
